skillGeneratorInput.note: No new signals this cycle — WorkIQ service error. Candidates reflect best institutional knowledge from last confirmed cycle (C31). All patterns DECLINING due to 23-cycle data gap.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, agenda, or Loop doc and emits structured action items with owner/due-date, decisions log, follow-up email draft, and ADO task stubs. Chain head for 2 downstream patterns. 339 occ across 31 unbroken cycles before data gap.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from this meeting transcript
Summarize customer meeting into Loop page with owners
Create standardized 1:1 notes template from agenda
Generate post-meeting recap with decision log
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces ~61 hrs across 4 roles. Composite score 92. Est. ~$156K/yr codification value.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Ingests eval results, strategy discussions, and actionability brainstorm threads. Produces structured eval reports, coverage analysis, and Golden Evals methodology guidance. 434 occ, highest value score in catalog (95).
triggerExamples: Synthesize eval progress from these CAPE threads
Generate actionability analysis from working session notes
Prepare Golden Evals kickoff report from strategy doc
Create eval strategy overview from Teams discussion
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~109 hrs across 5 roles. Highest value score (95). Est. ~$278K/yr.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies ADO notifications by work-item type, workstream, and urgency. Routes to action vs FYI vs delegate buckets. SATURATED at 863 occ — decomposition into 5 workstream sub-classifiers overdue.
triggerExamples: Triage my ADO inbox — action required vs FYI
Classify these notifications by workstream
Which ADO items need PM response today?
Route this task to the correct DRI
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates ~31 hrs of manual triage. Highest automation score (95). Est. ~$79K/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-design-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Codifies eval expert institutional knowledge. Answers eval design questions (sample sizes, grading strategy, coverage models). Bottleneck Severity Index 87 CRITICAL — single PM is sole DRI for eval expertise across 8+ request types.
triggerExamples: How many evals do I need for a 3-intent agent?
Should I use keyword match or semantic similarity grading?
Guide me through an actionability assessment
What's the Golden Eval methodology for this use case?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Unblocks BSI 87 CRITICAL bottleneck. 213 occ. Est. ~$130K/yr expert codification value.

candidateSkills.name: calendar-triage-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Analyzes meeting portfolio, flags overload patterns, recommends accept/decline/delegate decisions, and generates conflict resolution options. WCI 67 CRITICAL observed (single event = 42% of weekly budget). 671 occ, 428 hrs.
triggerExamples: Review my calendar for this week — what should I decline?
I have 3 overlapping meetings — help me prioritize
Which recurring meetings have low ROI for my role?
Generate a meeting consolidation proposal for my manager
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Addresses highest cumulative time drain (428 hrs). WCI 67 CRITICAL. Est. ~$112K/yr.
